description: An investigator must analyze a network packet capture (PCAP) file from a compromised host to identify the attacker's command-and-control (C2) channel.

nodes.task_description: Load the PCAP file into a network analysis tool like Wireshark.

expected_outcome.value: Investigator successfully loads the evidence file.

nodes.task_description: Filter the traffic to identify suspicious connections to external IP addresses over non-standard ports.

expected_outcome.value: Investigator isolates a long-running, encrypted connection to an unknown IP address over port 4444.

nodes.task_description: Identify the external IP address as the C2 server and extract it to be blocked at the firewall.

expected_outcome.value: Investigator successfully identifies the C2 infrastructure from the network traffic.
